objective: Determine the smallest defensible next step after PKR-P19 exhausted its frozen pair schedule with zero confirmed regressions and 39 inconclusive rows.
method: Inspect the frozen schedule and comparator pair limits.
Classify evidence gaps as missing data, identity drift, confirmed regression, or directional disagreement.
Choose the smallest progression that preserves the fixed-look and no-favorable-repeat walls.
anti_goals: Do not edit product, benchmark, tests, docs, configuration, PR, or prior evidence.
Do not rerun benchmark captures or comparators.
Do not extend the pair schedule after seeing the result.
Do not claim that regressions are absent.
Do not merge, release, publish, or deploy.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
